wordplay_note: The manly man whose fate is determined by precognitive children
card_description: Anderton (John) (meaning "Anderton = son of Andrew (manly)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Minority Report*. Police commissioner of Precrime who discovers he is predicted to commit murder. Name note: The manly man whose fate is determined by precognitive children. Free will versus determinism — can you change a future that has been seen?. First appears in *The Minority Report*.

reference.brief: Police commissioner of Precrime who discovers he is predicted to commit murder
reference.significance: Free will versus determinism — can you change a future that has been seen?
